# Bun.js Docker Images

Last generated: 2026-06-20

Images are published to:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun
```

The workflow builds every pinned Bun.js version for both `linux/amd64`
and `linux/arm64`.

## Variants

| Variant | Base image pattern | Tags | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `full` | `oven/bun:<version>` | `latest`, `1.3`, `1.3.14` | Official runtime image with Debian or default upstream tooling. |
| `alpine` | `oven/bun:<version>-alpine` | `latest-alpine`, `1.3-alpine`, `1.3.14-alpine` | Official Alpine runtime image where upstream publishes one. |

## Tag Rules

For each exact version, CI publishes both variants:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun:<version>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun:<version>-alpine
```

The newest patch in each release line also gets line aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun:<line>
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun:<line>-alpine
```

The newest resolved version also gets latest aliases:

```text
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun:latest
ghcr.io/michlip-eu/generic/bun:latest-alpine
```

## Status Meanings

| Status | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Current | Newest pinned version on the newest pinned release line. Prefer this for new work. |
| Supported | Newest pinned version on another current pinned line. |
| Superseded | Older patch in a current pinned release line. Kept for reproducibility. |
| Deprecated | Older release line. Kept only for legacy rebuilds. |

Bun images track pinned upstream releases. Older versions are kept for reproducible rebuilds.

## Published Versions

| Version | Full image tag | Alpine image tag | Alias tags | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`1.3.14`](bun/1.3.14.md) | `1.3.14` | `1.3.14-alpine` | `latest`, `latest-alpine`, `1.3`, `1.3-alpine` | Current |
| [`1.3.13`](bun/1.3.13.md) | `1.3.13` | `1.3.13-alpine` | None | Superseded |
| [`1.2.21`](bun/1.2.21.md) | `1.2.21` | `1.2.21-alpine` | `1.2`, `1.2-alpine` | Supported |
| [`1.2.20`](bun/1.2.20.md) | `1.2.20` | `1.2.20-alpine` | None | Superseded |
| [`1.1.45`](bun/1.1.45.md) | `1.1.45` | `1.1.45-alpine` | `1.1`, `1.1-alpine` | Deprecated |

## Version Sources

CI refreshes this runtime from every matching upstream release git tag, then
merges those discovered versions with pinned versions in
`generic/bun/versions.yml`.
